full_text:
Hu Lei (Bozhong) 扈累 (伯重)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hu Lei (扈累), styledBozhong (伯重), was born in Jingzhao. Wandering scholar who became a hermit in Wei. Died in his 80’s yet looked as in in 40’s. Hu Lei lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
